reference: UPON MY RETURN I VISITED SMOLNY NO SUCH ACCUSATION WAS MADE AGAINST ME THERE AFTER A BRIEF CONVERSATION I LEFT AND THAT'S ALL LET ANY ONE PRESENT MAKE SUCH AN ACCUSATION
text: Upon my return I visited Smolny. No such accusation was made against me there. After a brief conversation I left, and that's all. Let anyone present make such an accusation!
